Flare Gas Recovery Rate
==================================================

.. math::

   \text{}

.. raw:: html

   <table class="kpi-table">
      <tbody>
         <tr>
            <td>Description</td>
            <td><ul><li>The Flare Gas Recovery Rate measures the effectiveness of systems designed to recover gas that would otherwise be flared</li><li>thereby reducing waste and minimizing environmental impact</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Objective</td>
            <td><ul><li>The objective of this KPI is to maximize the recovery of flare gas</li><li>ensuring that as much gas as possible is utilized rather than released into the atmosphere</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Formula</td>
            <td>
               <p>The Flare Gas Recovery Rate is calculated by dividing the volume of gas recovered by the total volume of gas flared and recovered, then multiplying by 100 to express it as a percentage.</p>
               <div class="math-equation">$$ \mathit{Total\,Gas} = \mathit{Gas\,Flared\,M3} + \mathit{Gas\,Recovered\,M3} $$</div><ul><li>Gas Flared M3: Value used in the calculation as defined by the code implementation.</li><li>Gas Recovered M3: Value used in the calculation as defined by the code implementation.</li></ul><script>if (window.MathJax) {  if (MathJax.typesetPromise) { MathJax.typesetPromise(); }  else if (MathJax.typeset) { MathJax.typeset(); }}</script>
            </td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Used in KPI(s)</td>
            <td><ul><li>This KPI is used in environmental performance assessments and compliance reporting to evaluate the efficiency of gas recovery systems</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Input Measure</td>
            <td><ul><li>The inputs for this KPI include the volume of gas flared and the volume of gas recovered</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Unit of Measure</td>
            <td>variance (units^2)</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Reporting Source</td>
            <td>The data for this KPI is typically sourced from gas measurement systems and environmental monitoring reports.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Comments</td>
            <td>A higher recovery rate indicates better performance in managing flare gas, which is crucial for meeting regulatory requirements and enhancing sustainability efforts.</td>
         </tr>
      </tbody>
   </table>

.. admonition:: Code Context
   :class: dropdown

   .. code-block:: python
      :linenos:
   
      :emphasize-lines: 6
   

      def calculate_flare_gas_recovery_percentage(gas_flared_m3: float, gas_recovered_m3: float) -> float:
       """Calculates the percentage of gas that is recovered instead of flared."""
       total_gas = gas_flared_m3 + gas_recovered_m3
       if total_gas == 0:
           return 100.0
       # KPI: Flare Gas Recovery Rate
       # Measures the effectiveness of systems designed to reduce waste and environmental impact.
       recovery_rate = (gas_recovered_m3 / total_gas) * 100
       return recovery_rate
